recommendations.title: Operation Christmas Drop
recommendations.overview: While gathering evidence to support closing a tropical U.S. Air Force base, a congressional aide warms to its generous captain.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Justice League: The Flashpoint Paradox
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Flash finds himself in a war-torn alternate timeline and teams up with alternate versions of his fellow heroes to restore the timeline.

recommendations.title: Hammer of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Action epic sees a passionate young man transform into a brutal warrior as he travels the unforgiving landscape in search of his long lost brother Hakan The Ferrocious, whose people are relying on him to restore order to their kingdom.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.
